title: 阪神大賞典にむけて[普通]

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
The Hanshin Daishoten is a 3000-meter
long-distance turf race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
The venue and environment are different, but it's
similar to the Kikuka Sho.
choice_data_list: Besides that, you've grown a lot since then.
Besides that, you've grown a lot since then.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Well, even if I were to lose here, I wouldn't say
I've peaked.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Just you watch. I'll sink my teeth into victory for
sure!
